title: Subbed 10 Showing in Portland Oregon
wikitext:
[]: Subbed 1.0 Showing in Portland, Oregon             Quote Post by TheWaffleCult » Sun Jul 26, 2009 4:46 pm Showings start on August 21st . It's not the dub, but I'm sure a few purists will be happy to see the subbed version on the big screen!

[]:             Quote Post by Sailor Star Dust » Sun Jul 26, 2009 5:27 pm If Shiro and Birdy are lurking these forums, they should get their butts there and go!

[]:             Quote Post by roblucci01 » Sun Jul 26, 2009 5:45 pm A subbed version? Wow, thats interesting. Kind of a nice change of pace, although I'd be happy to see it either way if its on the big screen. Northern/ Westerners are lucky :3 We don't get anime films too often in the south, even in big cities like Miami and Atlanta ;/

[]:             Quote Post by TheWaffleCult » Sun Jul 26, 2009 5:48 pm I'll definitely be going, so I may see some Northwest Evageeks there?

[]:             Quote Post by Dartz » Sun Jul 26, 2009 5:50 pm Better than here. They never fucking show up. Last thing we got was Howls Moving Castle for 2 weeks.

[]:             Quote Post by Sailor Star Dust » Sun Jul 26, 2009 5:54 pm Front Page News-ified: http://www.evageeks.org/2009/07/rebuild-1-0-showing-subtitled-in-oregon/

[]:             Quote Post by TheWaffleCult » Sun Jul 26, 2009 6:08 pm Sailor Star Dust wrote: Front Page News-ified: http://www.evageeks.org/2009/07/rebuild-1-0-showing-subtitled-in-oregon/
